soft_deny: Any INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, TRUNCATE, or DDL statement against a production database host
Modifying files under ~/.claude or shell profiles unless the user explicitly asked for it
environment: REPLACE: one line describing this machine and its primary work (e.g. 'headless Linux VPS; Go services under ~/Code, deployed via CI').
REPLACE: which databases/hosts are dev (safe to query) and which are PRODUCTION (read-only at most).
REPLACE: what is routine here (test suites, local containers) so the classifier stops asking about it.
